title: Quad Storage or IRI class fails: Virtuoso 22023 Error SR008
description:
For all my IRI classes with more than one argument I get an error when querying instances of the given IRI class for an explicit IRI. The query:
define input:storage <http://extbi.cs.aau.dk/mappings/quad_storage/default>

prefix mrk: <http://extbi.cs.aau.dk/ontologies/agriculture#>

select *
where {?S mrk:markkortid ?markkortid.
?S ?P ?O .
FILTER(?markkortid="191430") }

Leads to the following error:
Virtuoso 22023 Error SR008: Function sprintf needs an integer as argument 2, not an arg of type VARCHAR (182)

SPARQL query:
define sql:big-data-const 0
#output-format:text/html
define input:storage

prefix mrk:

select *
where {?S mrk:markkortid ?markkortid.
?S ?P ?O .
FILTER(?markkortid="191430") }

The IRI class is defined as:
create iri class mrkmap:field_iri
"http://extbi.cs.aau.dk/data/agriculture/field#%U_%U"
    (in markkortid varchar not null, in marknr varchar) .

Additionally I have tried:
create iri class mrkmap:field_iri
"http://extbi.cs.aau.dk/data/agriculture/field#%s_%s"
    (in markkortid varchar not null, in marknr varchar) .

and
create iri class mrkmap:field_iri
"http://extbi.cs.aau.dk/data/agriculture/field#%d_%s"
    (in markkortid integer not null, in marknr varchar) .

but to no avail.
I have also googled around - finally ending here - without finding any help.
Any fix or help is welcome. Thanks.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE mrkmap_field_iri_1 (markkortid String NOT NULL, marknr String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY markkortid;
CREATE TABLE mrkmap_field_iri_2 (markkortid String NOT NULL, marknr Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY markkortid;
key_bug_features: IRI class with multiple arguments causes query error
